title: Modified Database Record
description:
Finance reconciliation flagged a high-value balance anomaly.

Download the case pack and investigate multi-source database telemetry (high-volume MySQL audit events, CDC stream events, SIEM-normalized DB logs, binlog decode excerpt, and reconciliation evidence).

Expect realistic noise and false positives from nightly jobs. Identify the *primary* CIA pillar violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}
